title: SIMREX 1:12 Scale All-Terrain Remote Control Car, 4WD RC Cars with 2.4 GHz, RC Climbing Truck, IPX4 Waterproof Off-Road Vehicle with Two Rechargeable Batteries, for Kids Teens Adults
features: 【EXCEPTIONAL ALL-TERRAIN ADAPTABILITY】: This high-speed remote-controlled off-road vehicle boasts multi-terrain adaptability, effortlessly conquering various terrains, whether it's driving on roads, gravel, or rock climbing. Its powerful four-wheel drive and highly realistic exterior design enable the off-road vehicle to exhibit outstanding performance on various complex surfaces, truly achieving both off-roading and climbing capabilities. It features impressive shock absorption and stable driving performance

【CRAFTSMANSHIP WITH HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS】:The frame is made of alloy steel structure, with metal protective plates, metal cooling fins, and all-metal bearings to ensure the durability of the off-road vehicle. Key components such as underbody components and protective frames are made of high-strength engineering nylon materials, which are more resistant to wear and impact. All four wheels are equipped with independent suspension systems, coupled with high-performance coil springs, which not only provide excellent shock absorption, but also ensure smooth and comfortable driving

【ADVANCED REMOTE CONTROL AND LIGHTING SYSTEM】:Equipped with a 2.4GHz high-frequency remote control, it boasts stronger signals and a remote control distance of approximately 328 FT, offering exceptional control performance. The full-ratio steering adjustable steering gear system allows for more precise and flexible driving. The front and rear LED high-definition turn signals synchronize with remote steering to indicate left and right turns, and double-blinking during reverse enhances safety during nighttime or poor visibility conditions

【POWERFUL PERFORMANCE AND LONG BATTERY LIFE】:Powered by a high-torque 370 strong magnet motor, it provides immense power, enabling the off-road vehicle to easily climb slopes of 50-60 degrees. This remote-controlled car comes with two batteries, each capable of running for about 20-30 minutes, satisfying long-duration entertainment needs. The vehicle's maximum speed is approximately 20Km/h, with adjustable speed settings to cater to different driving scenarios

【WATERPROOF RATING AND SUITABLE AGE】:The off-road vehicle features an IPX4 waterproof rating, capable of resisting water droplets to a certain extent, suitable for outdoor use. Additionally, this product is suitable for children aged 6 and above, as well as adolescents and adults, providing a safe and enjoyable driving experience for both parent-child interaction and solo play
